display_text: Omniknight Aghanim's Scepter: Turns Guardian Angel into a global ability that also affects buildings and amplifies healing. This upgrade counters AoE damage and siege strategies, transforming Omniknight into a reliable teamfight protector and high-ground defender.
search_text: Omniknight Aghanim Scepter global healing counter-AoE anti-siege high-ground defender

display_text: Omniknight Aghanim's Shard: Purification now re-applies after 3 seconds at reduced effectiveness, countering burst damage over time and prolonged engagements by ensuring sustained healing and damage mitigation.
search_text: Omniknight Aghanim Shard Purification burst counter sustained healing damage mitigation
